ddls:
CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "organization_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organization associated with the theater */,
  "organization_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the organization associated with the theater */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the theater */,
  "cinema_treasures_url" TEXT /* URL to the theater's page on Cinema Treasures */,
  "dissolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the theater was dissolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the theater opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the theater closed */,
  "theater_type" TEXT /* Type of theater (e.g., movie theater, playhouse, concert hall) */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the theater */,
  "architect" TEXT /* Name of the architect who designed the theater */,
  "architectural_style" TEXT /* Architectural style of the theater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theater associated with the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the theater is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the theater is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the theater is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the theater */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the theater */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the theater */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the theater is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theater associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the event information */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., opening, closing, renovation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_events_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, historian, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater associated with the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., edit, addition, comment) */,
  "contribution_content" TEXT /* Content of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theater_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater version */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater associated with the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theater_versions_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theater_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater associated with the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., image, video, article) */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theater_resources_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)
